title: Corrupted Items
description: A pack that edits the rotation of items and blocks in the inventory, based on a corruption I did
body:
# Why the name? I was messing around corrupting Minecraft, and one corruption rotated the blocks in an interesting way in the inventory. I originally made this pack as a bit of joke to recreate the corruption, then ended up liking the look of it and made it into a full pack! See the gallery for screenshots of the corruptions this is based off of ## Compatibility This should be compatible with most packs that change textures. It may not be compatible with packs that change the models of items or blocks. This pack has special compatibility with the Enchanted Vertical Slabs mod ## License

Corrupted Items by ioblackshaw (a.k.a. Enchanted_Games) is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0
